name: orchestra
description: Multi-AI collaboration orchestration — Claude Code Opus conducts, coordinating itself (Performer) and ChatGPT Pro (Reviewer) through a scoping-hardened, context-durable workflow. v0.8.0 adds an early breadth-first knowledge-building Landscape pass, a dynamic research-coverage standard (source-type/recency/triangulation) with a missing-coverage review lens, two-layer process-physics grounding (universal invariants + decision-driven design criteria), and a convergence-driven decide gate (confirmation pass, disagreement ledger, human-escalation on stall) on top of the 8 verification mechanisms.
